notes: The game won't launch with clean installation. But with the tweaks it runs perfectly fine. The installation lacks .NET and video codecs. I've deleted original prefix and run WINEPREFIX=/home/{USERNAME}/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/538680/pfx winecfg to fix .NET problem. In order to fix black screen video problem I've installed K-Lite Mega Codec Pack in the prefix. Steam controller worked without any tweaks.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel

notes:
Now with proton 4.2-5 it runs out of the box.
Video playback is still an issue, tried k-lite pack as others suggested but the game wouldn't start with it at all. Luckily for this game only the intro and some map travel transitions are pre-rendered. Honestly could be considered platinum.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel

notes: The only tweak necessary is installing lav-filters codecs to your wine prefix to fix the OP song cutscene. You won't be missing anything else if you decide not to. Runs on Max settings out of the box.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel

notes: Install dependencies: "protontricks 538680 corefonts vcrun2008 xact vcrun2015 amstream dsound gdiplus quartz xvid", Then install k-lite codecs. Game runs perfectly with videos functional.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel

notes: Got intro video working by installing k-lite basic pack and quartz.dll. In-game seems to work whether video is fixed or not.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel
